name: xdm_backend_selection_overlay
description: Adds safe per-download native/aria2 ownership, automatic backend recommendations, persisted task adoption, pre-ownership fallback, collision protection, and unified UI controls.
commitMessage: Add safe native and aria2 backend selection
constraints: Apply on top of commit fdd2615
Require zero warnings and zero errors
Keep the native backend as the safe default
Never fall back to native after an aria2 task identifier has been established
Never allow two active backends to write the same destination
Preserve persisted aria2 ownership until task absence is confirmed by a healthy RPC refresh
Preserve resume integrity, queue policies, browser security, and rollback-safe updates
